creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Christer,

They are not strictly compulsory, but issue reports with QA results tend heavily to be triaged, prioritised and committed before others. 

Moving forward there will be more metadata attributes associated around, and added to incentivizing high quality issue reports, with a view to making them even more quickly discoverable to committers.

Regarding what constitutes QA:

1) portlint -AC, and
2) poudriere testport (or bulk -t)
3) software test suite / unit test output

With (1) and (2) being the minimum.
